title: A CS Professor on Why Slow Learning Wins in the AI Era | CU Boulder, Tom Yeh
summary: Tom Yeh, an Associate Professor at CU Boulder, argues that teaching AI fundamentals by hand at human speed builds durable skills resistant to hype cycles. He contends that focusing on mathematical foundations rather than latest tools better prepares students, and that people should shape AI development rather than the reverse.
